rows.Why it matters: 8-month study period starts now. Earliest exam: Jan 2027.
Exam application form for Jan 2027 usually opens late Aug / early Sep. Check icai.org and SSP portal weekly.
Typically closes ~10 weeks before exam. Submit BEFORE the last week to avoid SSP portal congestion. Pay exam fee (~₹2,700 for Group 2).
You become eligible to write the Inter exam from this date.
No new chapters. Only revision + 1 full mock + sleep 8 hrs.
Actual date confirmed when ICAI publishes the exam timetable.

rows.Date: 🏖  Recommended full rest days (one every 4 weeks)

rows.Why it matters: Sleep in, eat well, exercise, see family. Your brain consolidates while you rest.
